news.headline: Wild Eagle Saloon raises $2,905 for The Gathering Place during a month-long fundraiser in October at three locations.
news.summary: In December 2024, three Wild Eagle Saloon branches in Broadview Hts, Cleveland, and Streetsboro held a fundraising campaign during the month of October in support of Breast Cancer Awareness Month. The initiative proved successful, collecting a total of $2,904 to benefit The Gathering Place, a nearby organization dedicated to supporting individuals affected by breast cancer.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value soars past $100,000 due to support from Trump and Powell's comments on cryptocurrency.
Russell Stover Chocolates launches contest with Lacey Chabert, chance to win holiday getaway. Celebrating since 1923.
news.summary: Actress Lacey Chabert has joined forces with renowned chocolatier Russell Stover to spread holiday cheer. The partnership aims to inspire individuals to reminisce on joyful moments and share them with Russell Stover. Established in 1923, Russell Stover Chocolates is a beloved American brand. This collaboration comes as a festive treat to commemorate the holiday season.

news.headline: Investors with losses exceeding $75,000 in TMC urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential legal action.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses totaling over $75,000 in TMC to reach out to him directly. The losses must have occurred between May 12, 2023, and March 25, 2024. If you meet these criteria and wish to explore your options, Wilson is available for a discussion regarding your situation.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of Edwards Lifesciences Corporation who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 between Feb 6, 2024 to Jul 24, 2024. Contact James Wilson if affected.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses surpassing $100,000 in Edwards within the period from February 6, 2024, to July 24, 2024, to reach out to him directly. If you fall into this category, it is recommended that you discuss your options by contacting him for further guidance.

news.headline: Former HOMER Energy CEO Peter Lilienthal joins Xendee as advisor to boost global distributed energy growth.
news.summary: A notable figure in the energy sector, Peter Lilienthal, the founder of HOMER Energy, has recently partnered with Xendee as an advisor. This collaboration aims to bolster the expansion of distributed energy and microgrid solutions on a global scale. Xendee's decision to onboard Lilienthal reflects their commitment to advancing sustainable energy practices. This strategic move is expected to leverage Lilienthal's expertise and experience in the industry. The involvement of such a seasoned professional signifies a significant milestone for Xendee, signaling their dedication to driving innovation and progress in the field.

news.headline: Toll Brothers plans luxury community in Encinitas, CA with 42 homes opening in early 2025.
news.summary: Encinitas, California - Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), a prominent luxury home builder in the US, unveiled details about its upcoming project, The Cove at Encinitas. Located on La Costa Avenue in Encinitas, this exclusive community will consist of only 42 homes. The development is set to launch in early 2025, offering a limited collection of luxurious residences to potential buyers.

news.headline: Akima's subsidiary ASE to modernize IT infrastructure for USINDOPACOM, bolstering national defense.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, on December 5, 2024, Akima, a leading supplier of products and services to the federal government, revealed that its branch, Akima Systems Engineering (ASE), has secured a deal with the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command (USINDOPACOM) to revamp essential operations.

news.headline: Canvas Medical releases Canvas SDK for safe AI adoption & custom automations. Transition from closed beta to general availability is a significant step.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Canvas Medical unveiled its Canvas SDK, marking a significant milestone as it transitions from closed beta to general availability. The SDK launch signifies a substantial increase in capabilities for the EMR company, which aims to enhance everyday medicine practices.

news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $277.7 mln.
Info-Tech Research Group introduces sociotechnical wireframing for AI solutions, balancing human needs; systematic approach for design.
news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group has introduced a novel sociotechnical wireframe methodology that assists IT leaders in developing generative AI solutions. This method emphasizes the importance of balancing technological advancements with human considerations. The wireframe outlined in their publication, "Wireframe Your [title]," offers a structured approach to designing these solutions. This framework prioritizes both innovation and human-centric aspects. Through this methodology, IT leaders can create AI solutions that are efficient and considerate of human needs, ensuring a well-rounded approach to implementation.

news.headline: Infobip reports 11.6 billion Cyber Week communications, showing 41% increase from last year, emphasizing RCS importance.
news.summary: In Vodnjan, Croatia, leading global communications platform Infobip has announced unprecedented communication activity during Cyber Week, emphasizing the increasing significance of Rich Communication Services (RCS) and conversational interactions. Infobip documented a remarkable 11.6 billion communications interactions from Friday, November 29, to Monday, December 2, showcasing a substantial 41% surge from the previous year. This data demonstrates a notable shift towards conversational engagement, reflecting the evolving preferences in communication trends.

news.headline: Coloplast A/S held Annual General Meeting on 5 Dec 2024, adopting several resolutions.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Coloplast A/S convened its Annual General Meeting, where several resolutions were approved.

news.headline: Cunard is revamping Queen Elizabeth for 2025 Miami-Caribbean & Alaska cruises, launching a luxurious program with a 2,000-passenger capacity.
news.summary: Valencia, California, December 5, 2024 - Cunard has revealed a groundbreaking renovation of Queen Elizabeth, setting the stage for her upcoming landmark voyages. The ship will embark on its first Caribbean program departing from Miami and its inaugural Alaska season from Seattle in 2025. With a capacity to accommodate up to 2,000 passengers, the luxurious Queen Elizabeth promises an unforgettable travel experience.

news.headline: MAPP Advisors appoints Aleksandra Teichman as Senior VP of Embedded Finance and Banking to lead firm's expansion.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 5, 2024, MAPP Advisors, a prominent advisory firm focused on fintech and payments, revealed the selection of Aleksandra Teichman as the new Senior Vice President of Embedded Finance and Banking. In her role, she will lead the firm's growth efforts in this area.

news.headline: Troomi introduces new App Store for families in Utah, offering three tiers of app options for child safety and flexibility.
news.summary: In Orem, Utah, Troomi, a pioneer in child-safe technology and promoting family digital wellness, has unveiled its latest development - the Troomi App Store, which is being made available to all users starting today. This significant upgrade features a distinctive three-tiered assortment of applications, aiming to boost safety and adaptability for families by granting parents unparalleled authority over their child's online activities. This initiative guarantees children the advantages of an app store environment while assuring parents complete control over their child's digital interactions.

news.headline: Monks, part of S4 Capital plc, achieves AWS Generative AI Competency, highlighting expertise in AI. Las Vegas, Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Las Vegas, Monks, a digital brand under S4Capital plc., proudly announced its attainment of the AWS Generative AI Competency. This recognition designates Monks as an AWS Partner that spearheads progress in leveraging artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Renaissance Philanthropy and XTX Markets create $9 million AI for Math Fund to support new AI projects in mathematics.
news.summary: A newly established fund, the AI for Math Fund, has been introduced by Renaissance Philanthropy and XTX Markets in an effort to propel groundbreaking discoveries in mathematics through AI tools. The fund is set to allocate $9.2 million towards supporting new projects in this domain. This initiative was jointly announced in Washington and London on December 5, 2024.

news.headline: BigID, a leader in data security, achieves AWS Graviton Ready status, optimizing scanning performance, reducing costs. 27% in savings.
news.summary: Today, in New York, BigID, a top provider of data security and privacy solutions, disclosed its latest advancement in data scanning performance. The company has optimized its capabilities to work seamlessly with AWS Graviton processors, aiming to enhance efficiency and cut costs. This move allows BigID to be classified as AWS Graviton Ready, demonstrating its commitment to utilizing cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Ritz-Carlton Leadership Center unveils 2025 customer service training calendar: In-person & virtual courses promise actionable takeaways.
news.summary: Bethesda, Md., December 5, 2024 - An exciting opportunity awaits as in-person and live virtual courses are now available, offering valuable insights rooted in the acclaimed practices of The Ritz-Carlton brand. Delve into actionable takeaways that can revolutionize your organization's approach, guided by customer service principles that have shaped the success of this iconic brand. Unlock the power of these teachings to enhance your business operations and drive growth.

news.headline: Nestlé USA appoints Martin Thompson as CEO and U.S. Market Head, starting Jan. 1, 2025. Thompson to report to Nestlé CEO Zone Americas.
news.summary: Arlington, Virginia - Nestlé USA revealed on December 5, 2024, that Martin Thompson will assume the role of Chief Executive Officer and U.S. Market Head starting from January 1, 2025. Thompson, who will report to Steve Presley, Nestlé CEO Zone Americas, is set to join the Zone Americas team.

news.headline: SAS dominates AI evaluations, leading in 4 analyst rankings in 2024 - top vendor for AI/ML development.
news.summary: In December 5, 2024, it was reported that SAS® Viya® has been acknowledged as a top leader in AI/ML development and decision-making by leading analyst vendors in the industry. The excellence of SAS and its technologies has been consistently praised by top analyst firms, reaffirming the company's strong position in the market. This recognition in 2024 further solidifies SAS' reputation for innovation and proficiency in the field of AI/ML. The company's expertise and leadership in this area have been highlighted by key industry players, underscoring its significance in shaping the future of technology.

news.headline: Magnús Hafliðason joins Festi as Managing Director of N1, to be a part of the executive team next year.
news.summary: Magnús Hafliðason will be taking on the role of Managing Director at N1 and is set to become a part of Festi's Executive Management Team in the early months of the coming year.

news.headline: Pudgy Penguins NFTs surge as Bitcoin surpasses $100K, reaching all-time high in USD amidst market revival.
news.summary: The value of the Pudgy Penguins NFT collection has reached a record high in U.S. dollars, indicating a resurgence in the NFT market.

news.headline: UNC QB Max Johnson featured on Season 3 of ZIPS "Car Wash Convos", sharing his "never give up" spirit in episode.
news.summary: Before suffering a major injury in 2024, Max secured a spot on the Season 3 lineup of "Car Wash Convos" by ZIPS. In his episode, he candidly discussed his unwavering "never give up" attitude. The show broadcasted from Chapel Hill, North Carolina on Dec. 5, 2024, marking the commencement of the inaugural episode at the University of North Carolina.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Xiao-I Corp with losses exceeding $50,000. Contact for discussion.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have faced losses surpassing $50,000 in Xiao-I to reach out to him directly. If you have suffered losses greater than $50,000 by investing in Xiao-I American, Wilson is available to discuss your potential courses of action.

news.headline: Dr. Ryan Saadi praises public servants; Mayor Victor Sordillo inducted into NJ League of Municipalities Hall of Fame.
news.summary: Warren, New Jersey - On December 5th, 2024, Dr. Ryan Saadi, the CEO of Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN), a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy biotech company, announced the induction of their Board Member, Victor Sordillo PE, CSP, MBA, into The New Jersey League of Municipalities Hall of Fame. Tevogen Bio focuses on developing off-the-shelf, genetically unmodified T cell therapeutics for treating infectious diseases and cancers.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price surges above $100,000 post-election, sparking predictions of hitting $150,000-250,000 soon.
news.summary: After the price of Bitcoin soared over $100,000 shortly following Trump’s reelection, experts are now making bullish forecasts for the cryptocurrency, with some predicting it could reach anywhere from $150,000 to $250,000 in the near future.

news.headline: Corvias Property Management organizes fall events across seven Army installations to support military families.
news.summary: In Warwick, R.I., Corvias Property Management is dedicated to creating strong, vibrant communities for service members and their families across its seven Army installations. Through a series of fall events, they showcase their commitment to improving residents' quality of life and fostering connections among neighbors. Corvias acknowledges the challenges military families encounter and focuses on building spaces where they can thrive. These annual events underscore Corvias' efforts to enhance community support and create a welcoming environment for approximately [Specify Number] residents.

news.headline: Littelfuse Investor Day on Feb 26 in NYC to present business strategy and growth objectives. CEO and CFO to lead.
news.summary: Littelfuse, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFUS) recently disclosed plans for an Investor Day set to take place on February 26, 2025, in New York City. The event will feature key company figures including CEO Dave Heinzmann and CFO Meenal Sethna, along with other senior leaders, who will delve into the organization's business strategy, growth catalysts, and financial goals. This initiative is part of the company's commitment to driving a sustainable, connected, and safer world.

news.headline: Skullcandy and THX partner to bring THX Spatial Audio to 2025 headphones for immersive experience.
news.summary: In San Francisco, THX Ltd., a renowned company specializing in high-fidelity audio and video tuning, certification, and technology, has partnered with Skullcandy®, a well-known lifestyle audio brand. Together, they have announced a strategic collaboration to incorporate THX® Spatial Audio into select Skullcandy headphones by 2025. This partnership aims to enhance users' listening experiences by providing a more profound and immersive sound quality across various activities such as music, movies, games, streaming, sports, and more. This integration will offer a superior audio experience to consumers, elevating the quality and enjoyment of their audio content.

news.headline: AI spending in enterprises to rise by 5.7% in 2025, despite overall IT budget increase of under 2%: ISG Study.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in Stamford, Connecticut shows that enterprises are intending to boost their investment in artificial intelligence (AI) by approximately 5.7% in 2025. This rise in AI spending comes alongside more moderate growth in their overall IT budgets.

news.headline: Majority of Canadians (74%) cutting back on holiday spending amid increasing living costs, per Spring Financial Survey.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was stated that a record number of people attended the annual music festival, with over 100,000 attendees this year. The event featured over 200 musical acts across multiple stages, drawing attendees from all over the country. Additionally, the festival generated over $5 million in revenue for the local economy, showcasing its growing importance as a cultural and economic driver in the region. Overall, this year's event was deemed a huge success, with organizers already planning next year's festival to be even bigger and better.

news.headline: Nsight Health partners with Physicians Choice Medical in Miami to offer advanced patient monitoring solutions.
news.summary: In Miami on December 5th, 2024, Nsight Health, a prominent company specializing in Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) and Chronic Care Management (CCM), revealed a significant collaboration with Physicians Choice® Medical. The partnership aims to enhance services related to Billing, Revenue Cycle Management, Credentialing, and Practice.

news.headline: Spirit Airlines had a successful Thanksgiving week with over 5,200 flights connecting Guests to loved ones.
news.summary: In Dania Beach, Florida on December 5, 2024, Spirit Airlines showcased an impressive start to the bustling holiday travel period by facilitating connections for Guests across 5,200 flights throughout Thanksgiving week. The airline notably bolstered its performance during this period, enhancing travel experiences for numerous individuals looking to reunite with loved ones.

news.headline: Nordic and Benevolence Health collaborate to aid healthcare organizations with CMS TEAM bundled payment model.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on December 5, 2024, Nordic®, a worldwide health and technology consulting firm, unveiled a collaboration with Benevolence Health, a key developer of value-based care strategies. This partnership aims to aid hospitals mandated to engage in the new Centers for Medicare &...

news.headline: Clarios signs connected services deal after successful pilot, reducing idling by 40% for €1,300 annual fuel savings.
news.summary: A recent development in the commercial vehicle industry involves the introduction of a new product aimed at reducing idling in these vehicles. Clarios Connected Services has finalized an agreement following a successful trial with a European heavy-duty fleet operator. The innovative idle reduction solution has demonstrated a significant 40% decrease in unnecessary idling, ultimately improving fleet efficiency. It is estimated that this solution could result in projected annual fuel savings of €1,300 per vehicle.

news.headline: Startup Across AI raises seed round funding co-led by Village Global and Cota Capital, to launch Agentic AI for enterprise workflows.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 5, 2024, the startup Across AI revealed it has secured funding in a seed round that was oversubscribed. The investment was co-led by Village Global and Cota Capital. This funding will support the development and launch of their Agentic AI technology tailored for enterprise workflows. The exact amount of funding raised was not disclosed.

news.headline: Huge acquired by AEA Investors, joins forces with Hero Digital to create leading digital transformation business.
news.summary: Today in Brooklyn, two forward-thinking brands have united to form a prominent independent digital transformation entity. AEA Investors ("AEA") has acquired Huge, a renowned experience design and technology company. The acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, consolidating the strengths of both companies. This collaboration is set to elevate their position and offerings in the market.

news.headline: Alaska Airlines named official airline of Coachella & Stagecoach Festivals, offering most flights to Palm Springs.
news.summary: Prepare for an exceptional festival experience and an unforgettable trip to the desert skies next spring, as Alaska Airlines offers the most flights to Palm Springs. Commencing in April, this journey from Seattle promises to deliver music, style, and lasting memories.

news.headline: Kristina M. Johnson and Dave Shull appointed to Society for Science's Board of Trustees, bringing fresh perspectives.
news.summary: Washington, 5th December 2024 - Kristina M. Johnson and Dave Shull have recently become members of the Board of Trustees at the Society for Science. This announcement marks an important development for the organization, as their inclusion brings a wealth of experience and knowledge. The Society for Science expressed their enthusiasm regarding this addition, highlighting the value of their diverse expertise and fresh perspectives. This move is expected to further enhance the board's capabilities and overall impact.

news.headline: Potential confirmation of Trump's defense pick may depend on Iowa Senator Ernst's support.
Global fire-resistant glass market to grow significantly by 2033 due to increased demand for safety in construction.
news.summary: The global fire-resistant glass market is poised for significant growth, with a forecasted analysis spanning from 2024 to 2033. This market report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, emphasizes the importance of fire-resistant glass in contemporary construction. The increasing emphasis on safety and adherence to fire regulations is a key driver for this market, with fire-resistant glass playing a critical role in safeguarding buildings and their occupants. The report covers various applications, types, and regions relevant to this market segment, providing valuable insights for stakeholders.

news.headline: Susan Wallace promoted to Vice President & Chief HR Officer at Carlisle Companies (NYSE: CSL), with 30 years of experience.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL) has appointed Susan Wallace as the Vice President & Chief Human Resources Officer. She initially joined Carlisle Construction Materials in April 2019 as the Human Resources Director and later became the Vice President of Human Resources for the entire company in February 2024. Prior to her role at Carlisle, Ms. Wallace had a tenure at TE Connectivity and holds an impressive 30 years of experience in the field of human resources.

news.headline: US to sell $58 bln 3-year notes on December 10, to settle on December 16.
US to sell $72 bln 6-month bills on December 9, to settle on December 12.
US to sell $39 bln reopened 10-year notes on December 11th, to settle on December 16th.
US to sell $22 bln reopened 30-year bond on December 12th, to settle on December 16th.
Interpublic Group sells digital company Huge to AEA Investors; Huge to join Hero Digital in undisclosed deal. #IPG
news.summary: Interpublic Group (NYSE: IPG) revealed its recent sale of the digital agency Huge on December 5, 2024. The acquiring entity is AEA Investors, a prominent global private investment firm. Huge is set to merge with Hero Digital, a current AEA portfolio company. The financial details of the transaction remain undisclosed.

news.headline: US to sell $81 bln 3-month bills on December 9, to settle on December 12.
